# pexip_infinity_role_mapping (Resource)

Manages a role mapping with the Infinity service. Role mappings automatically assign roles to users based on attributes from identity providers like SAML, LDAP, or OAuth claims.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_role_mapping" "example" {
  name  = "Admin Role Mapping"
  value = "pexip-admins"
  role  = pexip_infinity_role.example.id
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role mapping. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `value` (String) The value to match for this role mapping.

### Optional

- `roles` (Set of String) List of role URIs to assign when this mapping matches.
- `source` (String) The source type for role mapping. Valid values: LDAP, OIDC. Default: LDAP

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the role mapping in Infinity
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the role mapping in Infinity
